tests.scenario: Mood check-in entry is saved successfully
tests.expected_result: The mood entry is saved successfully.

tests.scenario: Mood entry is not saved when check-in is abandoned
tests.expected_result: No mood entry is saved.

tests.scenario: Previously saved entries are shown in mood history
tests.expected_result: Previously saved mood entries are displayed.

tests.scenario: Mood history entries are displayed in chronological order
steps: Observe the order of saved entries
tests.expected_result: Mood history entries are displayed in chronological order.

tests.scenario: Reflective question appears after check-in
tests.expected_result: At least one reflective question is displayed.

tests.scenario: Reflective question does not appear without completed check-in
steps: Start but do not complete a mood check-in
tests.expected_result: No reflective question is displayed.

tests.scenario: User submits response to reflective question
tests.expected_result: The response is stored successfully.

tests.scenario: Blank reflective response is rejected or not stored
tests.expected_result: The blank response is not stored successfully.

tests.scenario: Support-oriented content is shown after relevant interaction
steps: Complete a relevant emotional support interaction
tests.expected_result: At least one support-oriented content item is displayed.

tests.scenario: Support content opens within the app
tests.expected_result: The support-oriented content opens within the app.

tests.scenario: Educational mental health content is displayed
steps: Navigate to educational or informational content
tests.expected_result: Educational or informational content is displayed within the app.

tests.scenario: Educational content is readable inside the app
tests.expected_result: The content is readable within an in-app screen.

tests.scenario: Insight-based feedback is generated from user data
steps: Trigger insight generation or open insights
tests.expected_result: At least one insight or summary feedback item is displayed.

tests.scenario: No insights are shown when sufficient data does not exist
steps: Use an account with insufficient mood data
tests.expected_result: No insight or summary feedback item is displayed.

tests.scenario: Premium content is clearly labeled
steps: Navigate to a page containing both free and premium content
tests.expected_result: Premium content is visibly labeled before selection.

tests.scenario: Free content is distinguishable from premium content
steps: Navigate to a page containing both free and premium content
tests.expected_result: Free content is distinguishable from premium content.

tests.scenario: Subscription information is accessible in the app
tests.expected_result: Subscription-related information is displayed within the app.

tests.scenario: Subscription information is shown before confirmation
steps: Navigate to a subscription confirmation flow
tests.expected_result: Subscription-related information is displayed before confirmation.

tests.scenario: Privacy-related information is shown before sensitive data use
steps: Access a feature involving sensitive personal or mental health data
tests.expected_result: Privacy-related information is displayed before continuing.

tests.scenario: Privacy information can be reviewed within the app
steps: Navigate to privacy or data-handling information
tests.expected_result: Privacy-related information is readable within the app.
